name: Rank-Up-Magic Raptor's Force
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＵＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ランクアップマジック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ラプターズ・フォース
desc: If a "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster was destroyed and sent to the Graveyard this turn while you controlled it: Target 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it, then Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Raidraptor" monster that is 1 Rank higher than that monster, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon.)
eff: If a "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster was destroyed and sent to the Graveyard this turn while you controlled it: Target 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it, then Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Raidraptor" monster that is 1 Rank higher than that monster, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon.)

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
